pi_items.source: Task description explicitly states: 'Create and join a room named VirtualBootcamp2024'
Web search confirmed this is a valid Jitsi Meet configuration parameter. Task description requires this parameter.
Web search confirmed this is a valid Jitsi Meet configuration parameter. Task description requires this parameter.
Web search confirmed config.subject is a valid Jitsi Meet configuration parameter for setting meeting title/subject.
Task description line 22 explicitly specifies: config.subject="Morning Bootcamp - Advanced Level". The metadata omits the '- Advanced Level' portion.
Task description requires: 'Save the full constructed URL to /home/ga/meeting_url.txt'
Task description requires: 'Create a report at /home/ga/meeting_config_report.txt'
Task description requires: 'Take a screenshot of the configured meeting and save it to /home/ga/meeting_configured.png'

privileged_info_summary: This task uses Jitsi Meet version stable-9753 running at http://localhost:8080 with custom configuration parameters. The task requires constructing a URL with the room name 'VirtualBootcamp2024' and three configuration parameters: config.startWithAudioMuted=true, config.startWithVideoMuted=true, and config.subject set to 'Morning Bootcamp - Advanced Level'. All three parameters are valid Jitsi Meet configuration options verified through official documentation and community sources. The task verifier checks for file existence, URL parameter correctness, and visual confirmation via VLM analysis of meeting state (audio/video muted status and subject visibility). The meeting subject metadata claim is incomplete, as it specifies only 'Morning Bootcamp' rather than the full required text 'Morning Bootcamp - Advanced Level'.
